title: Matrix bridge
description: Bridge bot connecting nie rooms to Matrix/Element networks so users on either side can talk without both adopting the same client. Required: bridge bot authenticates to nie relay as a normal public key identity; bot registers as an Application Service on a Matrix homeserver; incoming nie messages forwarded to a Matrix room as the sender pub_id; outgoing Matrix messages forwarded into nie as the bridge bot identity; identity mapping (nie pub_id <-> Matrix MXID) stored in bridge config; encryption boundary: nie side always E2E encrypted, Matrix side optional.
